attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WBMS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  WBMS.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  WBMS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  WBMS.PRODUCT_KEY,
  WBMS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  WBMS.AR_TRX_KEY,
  WBMS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WBMS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WBMS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WBMS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WBMS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WBMS.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
  WBMS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WBMS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  WBMS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  WBMS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  WBMS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
  WBMS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
  WBMS.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
  WBMS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
  WBMS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
  WBMS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  WBMS.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
  WBMS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
  WBMS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  WBMS.CANCELLED_FLG,
  WBMS.CANCEL_CODE,
  WBMS.ACQUISITION_FLG,
  WBMS.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
  WBMS.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
  WBMS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
  WBMS.OVERLAY_FLG,
  WBMS.IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  WBMS.CHARGES_FLG,
  WBMS.SALESREP_FLG,
  WBMS.MISC_FLG,
  WBMS.SERVICE_FLG,
  WBMS.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  WBMS.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  WBMS.REVENUE_FLG,
  WBMS.RMA_FLG,
  WBMS.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,
  WBMS.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  WBMS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
  WBMS.EDW_CREATE_USER,
  WBMS.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  WBMS.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  WBMS.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  WBMS.CONVERSION_RT,
  WBMS.CONVERSION_DT,
  WBMS.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  WBMS.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
  WBMS.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
  WBMS.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
  WBMS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
  WBMS.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
  WBMS.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
  WBMS.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
  WBMS.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
  WBMS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
  WBMS.DV_DEAL_ID,
  WBMS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  WBMS.DV_BOOKED_DT,
  WBMS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
  WBMS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,    /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
  WBMS.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, /* vetalla : Added as part of Q3FY14 RTE*/
  /*Added as aprt of Offer Attribution Q3FY14*/
  WBMS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,  
  WBMS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  WBMS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  WBMS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  WBMS.DV_FMV_FLG, /* Q1FY15 FMV */
  WBMS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM     ,
  WBMS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM       ,
  WBMS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION              ,
  WBMS.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG                 ,
  WBMS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT          ,
  WBMS.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
  WBMS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,  /* Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY15 */  
  WBMS.DSV_FLG, /* Added as part of DSV Q1FY16 */ 
  WBMS.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, /* Added as part of OA-Q1FY16*/
  WBMS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT, /* ADDED AS PART OF sep 27TH CD RELEASE */
  WBMS.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  WBMS.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  WBMS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
  WBMS.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
  WBMS.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT, /*BGM Changes Q1FY17*/
  /*VKOPPURA ADDED BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */ 
  WBMS.XCAT_FLG, 
  WBMS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, 
  WBMS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, 
  WBMS.ELA_FLG,
 WBMS.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,WBMS.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
 ,WBMS.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT    
 /*,WBMS.DV_TOTAL_CNTRCT_VAL_USD_AMT   */
 ,WBMS.DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT
 ,WBMS.DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT 
 ,WBMS.DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,WBMS.DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,WBMS.DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,WBMS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD   /*  added as part of June29th2017 */
 ,WBMS.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT/*Q1FY18*/
 ,WBMS.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,WBMS.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,WBMS.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
 WBMS.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 WBMS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,
 WBMS.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
 WBMS.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
 WBMS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */,
 /*Added as part of EDW_FY19 Nov08Rel CR11701*/
 WBMS.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT,
WBMS.DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT,
WBMS.DV_ENRICHED_CONTRACT_DURATION,
WBMS.DV_ENRICHMENT_RULE_DESC,
/* added as part of 10th March release*/
WBMS.ENRICHED_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WBMS.DV_ENRICHED_UNK_END_CUST_RULE_DESC,
WBMS.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,    /* added as part of Revenue Accruals  */
WBMS.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY    /* added as part of MERAKI  */
,WBMS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WBMS.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,WBMS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
,WBMS.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE
,WBMS.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WBMS.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
/*,'UNK' AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD*/
,WBMS.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE  /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
,WBMS.DV_INV_DTM
,WBMS.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,WBMS.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,WBMS.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,WBMS.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
,WBMS.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
,WBMS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
,WBMS.DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG	/*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
,WBMS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WBMS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WBMS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,WBMS.DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,WBMS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,WBMS.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
  FROM
  $$WORKDB.W_BKGS_MEASURE WBMS
